title: Pungent Australian Comte Pavlova
description: Crisp meringue exterior and creamy Comte cheese interior, finished with a sweet lacquer glaze. A unique and adventurous Australian dessert.
instructions: Line a baking tray with parchment paper.
In a clean bowl, whip the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
Sift the icing sugar over the egg whites and mix until combined.
Add the softened butter and mix until just combined.
Spoon the mixture onto the prepared baking tray, forming a round shape.
Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the meringue is crisp and golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
In a small saucepan, combine the lacquer glaze ingredients and heat over low heat, stirring until smooth.
Brush the lacquer glaze over the cooled meringue.
Sprinkle with vanilla extract and serve immediately.
